title: Retouched
description: This pack aims to retouch some of Minecraft's textures!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6c24eaee9860ef21b0623bcb635a786ee65a685_0.webp)
As the title suggests, this pack aims to retouch Minecraft's textures!

This pack has some features only visible with mods that support CEM (Custom Entity Models). These mods are NOT required to use this pack- it will still work without them. Hope you enjoy!

## Full Features List: [Google Doc](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Ll1J0vI6c-KB0ZMcxHihhYhJrITPUis3KHWc0kwNH04/edit?usp=sharing)
